description_long: This object is an abstract, highly angular form with sharp, jagged edges and irregular, intersecting planes. The structure lacks any recognizable human features such as limbs, head, or torso, and instead consists of a series of black and white geometric shards. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with high contrast between the black and white areas, giving it a fragmented, almost crystalline appearance. There are no visible details that suggest clothing, accessories, or anatomical features typical of a pedestrian adult. The overall form is chaotic and does not resemble a natural human posture or silhouette. The object appears to be composed of solid, hard material with no visible openings or interactive components.
description: An abstract, jagged geometric form with sharp intersecting black and white planes, lacking any recognizable human features or clothing.
description_view_0: A close-up of intersecting black and white angular planes, with sharp edges and no discernible human features.
description_view_1: A wide, flat black plane dominates the view, with thin white extensions and sharp, pointed angles.
description_view_2: A pointed, downward-extending black shard is visible, with angular white surfaces and intersecting lines.
description_view_3: A chaotic arrangement of black and white shards, with sharp, irregular edges and no identifiable human form.
